description:
⋆.˚ ᡣ𐭩 .𖥔˚ RYUJI YAMADA, TOXIC MARRIAGE OMEGAVERSE AU! MLM.

"daddy, where do babies come from?"

having arguments, fights and laying hands on each other were now a new normal in the bedroom. when the kids were asleep, when they were at school, whenever the chance. neither of them knew how it started.

but one thing, he and his husband never fought in front of their children, their prized love and joys. until one day, one of their twin sons, kenji, had asked where babies came from.
